message:
feat(search): implement daemon wire protocol with serde framing

Add a complete length-prefixed JSON wire protocol for the embedding
daemon, enabling out-of-process semantic search:

- protocol.rs: Add Serialize/Deserialize derives to DaemonRequest,
  DaemonResponse, EmbedRequest, EmbedResponse; implement length-prefixed
  framing (4-byte big-endian length + JSON payload) with 4MB max message
  size; add ProtocolError enum with thiserror; add async read_frame/
  write_frame for both tokio and std streams
- client.rs: Implement DaemonClient with Unix socket connection,
  async embed() RPC, health check via Ping/Pong, graceful shutdown,
  and connection lifecycle management
- server.rs: Add connection handling infrastructure for the daemon
  server side
- hybrid_search.rs: Wire daemon client into hybrid search pipeline
  as an alternative to in-process embedding
- search_integration.rs: Add integration tests for daemon protocol
  roundtrip, client-server communication, and error handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
